sika_system.name: Sikafloor® Multiflex PB-21 UV
sika_system.technical_note: ⏱️ Standard curing time. High elasticity for low temperatures.

mapei_analogue.name: Mapefloor Parking System HE
mapei_analogue.technical_note: ⏱️ Standard curing time (12-24h between layers). Highest OS 11b crack-bridging.

mc_bauchemie_analogue.name: MC-Bauchemie OS 11b System
mc_bauchemie_analogue.technical_note: ⏱️ Standard curing time. Single-layer combined seal/wear coat technology.

comparison.similarities: All systems offer dynamic crack-bridging for intermediate or exposed decks. Mapei and MC-Bauchemie meet OS 11b requirements.
comparison.differences_nuances: MC-Bauchemie OS 11b is a single-layer system where sealing and wear coats are combined, providing dynamic crack-bridging up to 0.3 mm. Mapei uses separate PU 400 + Finish 451 layers.
comparison.max_analogue_reasoning: Matching OS 11b classification across all three manufacturers ensures equivalent crack-bridging capability.

sika_system.name: Sikafloor® Multiflex PB-32
sika_system.technical_note: Rigid system, not UV stable. For indoor use.

mapei_analogue.name: Mapefloor Parking System ID
mapei_analogue.technical_note: Epoxy-based. Yellowing may occur if exposed to direct sunlight.

mc_bauchemie_analogue.name: MC-DUR 1322 (OS 8 System)
mc_bauchemie_analogue.technical_note: Extremely high mechanical resilience against rising damp.

comparison.similarities: Multi-layer systems for intermediate indoor decks. High mechanical resilience and seamless protection.
comparison.differences_nuances: Sika focuses on high-load durability. Mapei ID is a hybrid epoxy/PU solution. MC-Bauchemie MC-DUR 1322 is a highly resistant epoxy system tested against rising damp.
comparison.max_analogue_reasoning: Both are the 'go-to' solutions for indoor parking ramps and decks where UV resistance is not required but durability is key.

sika_system.name: Sikafloor® Multidur EB-14
sika_system.technical_note: Classic rigid epoxy system. High chemical resistance.

mapei_analogue.name: Mapefloor System 31
mapei_analogue.technical_note: Classic rigid epoxy system. High chemical resistance.

mc_bauchemie_analogue.name: MC-DUR 1252 (OS 8 System)
mc_bauchemie_analogue.technical_note: Multi-layer epoxy structure for extreme abrasion resistance.

comparison.similarities: All are rigid systems with anti-slip properties, certified to OS 8 for mechanical resistance.
comparison.differences_nuances: Sika uses Sikafloor-161/264. Mapei System 31 uses Primer SN/Mapefloor I 300 SL. MC-Bauchemie uses MC-DUR 1252.
comparison.max_analogue_reasoning: Direct functional and certification equivalent (OS 8) offering identical mechanical protection for industrial-grade traffic areas.

sika_system.name: Sikafloor® Pronto RB-55
sika_system.technical_note: ⚠️ ULTRA-FAST (MMA): Fully cured and ready for traffic in 1-2 hours. Strong odor during application.

mapei_analogue.name: Mapefloor Parking System ME
mapei_analogue.technical_note: ⚠️ STANDARD CURING (PU): Takes 12-24 hours per layer. Meets OS 11a but is NOT a true 'Fast Track' equivalent.

mc_bauchemie_analogue.name: MC-DUR OS 11a System (or MC-DUR TopSpeed flex plus)
mc_bauchemie_analogue.technical_note: ⚠️ FAST TRACK (KineticBoost): Rainproof in 2 hours, fully load-bearing in a few hours.

comparison.similarities: High-performance systems for decks. Slip-resistant and impermeable.
comparison.differences_nuances: Sika RB-55 is MMA-based (very rapid). Mapei System ME is Polyurethane-based (elastic). MC-Bauchemie offers a multi-layer OS 11a system or the extremely rapid TopSpeed flex plus system using KineticBoost technology.
comparison.max_analogue_reasoning: While chemistries differ, they fulfill the same high-tier crack-bridging and fast-return protection standards for parking areas.
